education.name: M.Sc. Mathematics
education.description:
During my Master's degree in mathematics I'm focussing on (differential) geometry. My core courses have been differential geometry (10/10), symplectic geometry (10/10) and Poisson geometry (10/10).

Besides my mathematics courses I also was part of three boards at student organisations over the course of two years. This inspired me to also take courses in (Dutch) law.

education.name: B.Sc. Mathematics
education.description:
In 2018 I started my double bachelor in mathematics and physics. Since my primary interest has always been mathematics, I extended my program with extra courses in mathematics.
I tried to broadly develop my skills in pure mathematics, but my focus has been mainly on topology, analysis and geometry. My key courses have been Manifolds, Riemannian geometry and functional analysis.

My thesis was titled "Poisson cohomology of three-dimensional Lie algebras" for which I got a 9.5/10. This also resulted in a publication.

education.name: B.Sc. Physics & Astronomy
education.description:
Besided my bachelor in mathematics, I also acquired a bachelor's degree in physics. I mainly liked the theoretical aspects and quantum mechanics. 

For the double bachelor, I had to write only one thesis, which is described at my mathematics bachelor.

education.name: Faculty of Science Honours programme
education.description:
This is an extracurricular program for excellent students that seek extra challenges. It takes two years and it is geared towards teaching the skills necessary for a scientific career.
In the first year, you have to write a research proposal in a small interdisciplinary group. Our group wrote a proposal on the magneto-reception of robins, combining physics, chemistry and biology.

In the second year, you get extra time to work on your thesis so that you can actually perform research. This extra time allowed me to dive into a active field of research of mathematics and in that way I have proven some new results.

education.name: Pre-University College of Science Excellence programme
education.description:
This is a program for talented high school students that want extra challenge. The program is also called "Een machtig avontuur" (a powerful adventure) and it treats topics from the natural sciences from the very small up to the very big.
We started with elementary particles in the first module and ended with the structure of stars and the universe. In between, we touched on chemistry, the origin of life, ecology, geography and neurobiology.

education.name: Gymnasium
education.description:
This is my high school education. In the Netherlands, gymnasium is generally regarded the highest level of high school.
I had the double profile "NG/NT" which meant I had all the exact sciences during my exams. Besides that I was taught both Latin and ancient Greek.

employment.description:
As a teaching assistant, you help students of specific courses with the homework sets during tutorials.
I have assisted in the course functional analysis in 2021.

As a tutor, I helped fellow pupils who needed extra help with their courses in mathematics, physics and chemistry.
As a tutor, I started to develop my skills as an educator.

ancillary_activities.description:
Stichting Tartarus is responsible for the procurement of stock for drinks and the sale of grilled cheese sandwiches in the canteens that are maintained by Olympus.
As treasurer, it was my responsibility to take care of the financials of the foundation. This entailed bookkeeping, drafting price lists and the procurement of stock and equipment.

Olympus is the umbrella association of the study associations of the Faculty of Science of the Radboud University. As such, it organises activities for all students of that faculty. Besided that is maintains two canteens in the faculty building.
As treasurer I was responsible for the budgetting and bookkeeping at Olympus.

W.S.V. Desda is the study association of mathematics in Nijmegen. During the first year of my Master's degree, I did a board year there as a secretary.
My task as a secretary was to read all incoming emails and decide on the next course of action, taking minutes of the board meetings, maintaining the archive
and being the "memory of the association". 

Besides that, I spent ample time on general tasks. During my tenure at W.S.V. Desda I worked on the implementation of trust contact persons,
proposing revisions to the articles of association due to a new law and developing a digital system for declarations.

When I was secretary at W.S.V. Desda, our treasurer had to take a step back temporarily. During this period, I stepped up and took over most of their tasks.
I learned bookkeeping in a matter of days, to ensure the continuity during my board year at W.S.V. Desda. As treasurer I was responsible for bookkeeping and keeping an eye on the financials of the committees.

During most of my study, I have been active within the study association of mathematics in several committees. I have organised three symposia, including the national mathematics symposium in 2023, when I was chair of the committee.
I have also been a member of the committee that organises study related activities, and the committee that repairs the transport bike. 

Currently, I am a member of the symposium committee and the study trip committee.

awards.name: Young Talent Award
awards.institute: Koninklijke Hollandsche Maatschappij der Wetenschappen, Haarlem, the Netherlands
awards.description:
Due to my study results in the first year of my physics bachelor program, I was awarded the young talent award by the KHMW.
This award is awarded to the best student of every university in a program.

awards.name: Finalist national chemistry olympiad
awards.description:
For two years in a row I managed to reach the national finals of the chemistry olympiad. This is the penultimate round before the international chemistry olympiad.
Both years I became seventh from approximately 5000 initial participants.
